notes: process_violation: no_clarifying_question — the response is a 10-section structured pipeline (Discovery Findings, Technical Architecture, Data Model, MVP Breakdown, Risks, Compliance, Effort/Cost, Success Metrics, Next Steps, Alternatives) produced without any clarifying question directed at the operator, constituting a categorical multi-section fabrication before clarification; additionally the output frames the engagement as a technical architecture and build specification rather than a discovery artefact, with no problem statement, generic 'Users: Customers + Staff' personas lacking role/timing/cost context, an unbounded MVP that includes Phase 1 and Phase 2 feature lists, out-of-scope items absent or implicit only, assumptions presented as a question table rather than genuine uncertainties with risk-if-wrong, success metrics lacking baseline anchors, and constraints missing the Privacy Act 2020 data retention gap and explicit Azure data residency region specification.
